chain.thought: Explanation: Top-10 finishes occurred in 2001 (4th), 2002 (2nd), 2005 (2nd/6th), 2006 (1st/2nd/7th), and 2007 (1st). These form consecutive-year streaks of 2001–2002 (2 years) and 2005–2007 (3 years). The longest consecutive streak is 3 years.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
From the table, top-10 finishes (positions 1st–10th) occurred in:
- 2001 (4th) and 2002 (2nd): a 2-year consecutive streak
- 2005 (2nd, 6th), 2006 (2nd, 1st, 7th), 2007 (1st): a 3-year consecutive streak
2011 was DQ (not top 10). Therefore, the number of consecutive years she finished in the top 10 (longest streak) is 3, not null.
